race.comment: ALWAYS FREE (4) is a two-start maiden who looks close to a win after placing at both runs, the latest when third over 1614m at Moe. Has early pace and is expected to go close again. NOTIFIED (12) made an encouraging debut last time out, finishing 3 lengths from the winner in fifth over 1200m at this track. Has upside and the extra trip is a plus. Can get off the mark this time. EGERTON REEF (2) has had a few tries but first look here last time led until the final few hops and was grabbed late. Can give a sight again.  FLYING CAPITAL (3) is yet to run a bad race in three starts, most recently finishing third over 1350m at Donald. The handy draw is a big plus. Overdue and looks very hard to beat.
